text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1054, but for the purpose of this exercise, we will use modern time zone offsets.

Modern offsets (ignoring DST, as 1054 had no DST):
- US/Hawaii: UTC−10:00
- Asia/Kolkata: UTC+05:30

Difference from Hawaii to Kolkata = (UTC+05:30) − (UTC−10:00) = 15 hours 30 minutes ahead.

2:00 AM December 10, 1054 (Hawaii) + 15 hours 30 minutes =  
2:00 + 15:30 = 17:30 (5:30 PM) same day December 10, 1054.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1054-12-10 17:30
